mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots ( id, tenant, snapshot_date, created_time, gmv, total_revenue, total_commission_earned, total_platform_fees, total_seller_payouts, pending_payouts, total_refund_amount, take_rate, total_orders, total_units_sold, avg_order_value, cancellation_count, rto_count, return_count, active_buyers, active_sellers, new_buyers, new_sellers, total_products_listed, total_skus, total_sessions, total_page_views, conversion_rate, cart_abandonment_rate, fraud_attempts_blocked, open_support_tickets, avg_delivery_days, on_time_delivery_rate, upi_pct, card_pct, cod_pct, wallet_pct, netbanking_pct, payment_success_rate ) SELECT 'kpi-' || #{snapshotDate}, 'homebase', #{snapshotDate}, NOW(), -- Revenue COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0), COALESCE(SUM(o.total_amount), 0), COALESCE(SUM(o.commission_amount), 0), COALESCE(SUM(o.commission_amount), 0), COALESCE(SUM(o.seller_payout), 0), COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ('DELIVERED','COMPLETED') AND o.seller_payout > 0 THEN 0 ELSE o.seller_payout END), 0), 0, -- refund_amount: computed from returns data CASE WHEN SUM(o.total_amount) > 0 THEN (SUM(o.commission_amount) * 10000 / SUM(o.total_amount))::INT ELSE 0 END, -- Orders COUNT(*), COALESCE(SUM(o.total_items), 0), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (SUM(o.total_amount) / COUNT(*))::BIGINT ELSE 0 END, COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ('CANCELLED','CANCEL_REQUESTED') THEN 1 END), 0, -- rto_count: from delivery data COUNT(CASE WHEN o.order_status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED','REFUNDED') THEN 1 END), -- Users COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id), COUNT(DISTINCT o.seller_id), 0, -- new_buyers: computed from customer_360_flat 0, -- new_sellers: computed from seller_dashboard_flat -- Catalog (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat WHERE product_status = 'PUBLISHED'), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT sku) FROM hm_query.inventory_health_flat), -- Traffic (from conversion funnel if available, else 0) 0, 0, 0, 0, -- Operations 0, 0, 0, 0, -- Payment mix CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_method = 'UPI' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_method = 'CARD' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_method = 'COD' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_method = 'WALLET' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_method = 'NETBANKING' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN o.payment_status IN ('COMPLETED','PAID') THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o WHERE o.order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate}

INSERT INTO hm_query.category_performance_daily ( id, tenant, summary_date, category_id, category_name, gmv, total_orders, total_units_sold, total_returns, return_rate, avg_order_value, active_sellers, active_listings, conversion_rate, avg_product_rating, avg_views_per_product ) SELECT 'catperf-' || p.category_id || '-' || #{snapshotDate}, 'homebase', #{snapshotDate}, p.category_id, p.category_name, COALESCE(SUM(oi.total_price), 0), COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id), COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0), 0, 0, -- returns computed separately CASE WHEN COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id) > 0 THEN (SUM(oi.total_price) / COUNT(DISTINCT oi.order_id))::BIGINT ELSE 0 END, COUNT(DISTINCT p.seller_id), COUNT(DISTINCT p.product_id), 0, -- conversion requires clickstream COALESCE(AVG(p.avg_rating), 0)::INT, COALESCE(AVG(p.views_30d) / NULLIF(30, 0), 0)::INT FROM hm_query.product_catalog_flat p LEFT JOIN hm_query.order_items_flat oi ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id AND o.order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate} WHERE p.product_status = 'PUBLISHED' GROUP BY p.category_id, p.category_name HAVING p.category_id IS NOT NULL

INSERT INTO hm_query.seller_health_summary_daily ( id, tenant, summary_date, total_sellers, healthy_sellers, at_risk_sellers, unhealthy_sellers, new_applications, pending_approvals, suspended_sellers, avg_health_score, avg_rating, avg_fulfillment_rate ) SELECT 'sellerhealth-' || #{snapshotDate}, 'homebase', #{snapshotDate}, COUNT(*), COUNT(CASE WHEN health_score >= 700 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN health_score >= 400 AND health_score < 700 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN health_score < 400 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN seller_status = 'APPLIED' THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN seller_status = 'PENDING_APPROVAL' THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN seller_status = 'SUSPENDED' THEN 1 END), COALESCE(AVG(health_score), 0)::INT, COALESCE(AVG(rating), 0)::INT, COALESCE(AVG(fulfillment_rate), 0)::INT FROM hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat

INSERT INTO hm_query.conversion_funnel_daily ( id, tenant, funnel_date, total_sessions, product_views, add_to_cart, checkout_initiated, purchase_completed, browse_to_cart_rate, cart_to_checkout_rate, checkout_to_purchase_rate, overall_conversion_rate ) SELECT 'funnel-' || #{snapshotDate}, 'homebase', #{snapshotDate}, -- Sessions and views from platform_kpi_snapshots (if computed) or estimate from orders COALESCE((SELECT total_sessions FROM hm_query.platform_kpi_snapshots WHERE snapshot_date = #{snapshotDate}), 0), 0, -- product_views: requires clickstream -- Cart: count distinct carts created that day (from order pipeline) (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED') THEN 1 END) * 4 FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate}), -- Checkout: orders that reached payment (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN payment_status IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate}), -- Purchase: completed orders (SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status NOT IN ('CANCELLED','CANCEL_REQUESTED','PAYMENT_FAILED') THEN 1 END) FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate}), -- Rates computed in application layer after insert 0, 0, 0, 0

INSERT INTO hm_query.revenue_by_region_daily ( id, tenant, summary_date, state, city, gmv, total_orders, avg_order_value, active_sellers, active_buyers, on_time_delivery_rate ) SELECT 'region-' || COALESCE(shipping_state, 'UNKNOWN') || '-' || #{snapshotDate}, 'homebase', #{snapshotDate}, COALESCE(shipping_state, 'Unknown'), NULL, -- city-level aggregation done separately SUM(total_amount), COUNT(*), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (SUM(total_amount) / COUNT(*))::BIGINT ELSE 0 END, COUNT(DISTINCT seller_id), COUNT(DISTINCT customer_id), CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN sla_status = 'ON_TRACK' OR sla_status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_date::DATE = #{snapshotDate} AND shipping_state IS NOT NULL GROUP BY shipping_state

INSERT INTO hm_query.top_products_today ( id, tenant, refreshed_at, rank, product_id, product_name, sku, category_name, seller_name, units_sold, revenue, stock_remaining, stock_status, avg_rating, review_count, conversion_rate ) SELECT 'top-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC), 'homebase', NOW(), ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC), p.product_id, p.product_name, p.primary_sku, p.category_name, p.seller_name, SUM(oi.quantity), SUM(oi.total_price), p.total_available_qty, p.stock_status, p.avg_rating, p.review_count, p.conversion_rate FROM hm_query.order_items_flat oi JOIN hm_query.order_details_flat o ON oi.order_id = o.order_id JOIN hm_query.product_catalog_flat p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE o.order_date::DATE = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY p.product_id, p.product_name, p.primary_sku, p.category_name, p.seller_name, p.total_available_qty, p.stock_status, p.avg_rating, p.review_count, p.conversion_rate ORDER BY SUM(oi.quantity) DESC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO hm_query.top_sellers_today ( id, tenant, refreshed_at, rank, seller_id, seller_name, tier, gmv_today, orders_today, products_count, fulfillment_rate, rating, health_score ) SELECT 'topseller-' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC), 'homebase', NOW(), ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC), s.seller_id, s.business_name, s.tier, SUM(o.total_amount), COUNT(DISTINCT o.order_id), s.total_products, s.fulfillment_rate, s.rating, s.health_score FROM hm_query.order_details_flat o JOIN hm_query.seller_dashboard_flat s ON o.seller_id = s.seller_id WHERE o.order_date::DATE = CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY s.seller_id, s.business_name, s.tier, s.total_products, s.fulfillment_rate, s.rating, s.health_score ORDER BY SUM(o.total_amount) DESC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO hm_query.live_order_pipeline ( id, tenant, refreshed_at, pipeline_date, placed_count, confirmed_count, packed_count, shipped_count, out_for_delivery_count, delivered_count, cancelled_count, returned_count, rto_count, placed_breach_4hr, placed_breach_8hr, packed_breach_4hr, shipped_breach_24hr, cancellation_rate, rto_rate, return_rate, orders_per_minute ) SELECT 'pipeline-' || CURRENT_DATE, 'homebase', NOW(), CURRENT_DATE, COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CREATED','PAYMENT_PENDING') THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('PAID','CHECK_FRAUD','PROCESSING') THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PROCESSING' THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('SHIPPED','PARTIALLY_SHIPPED') THEN 1 END), 0, -- out_for_delivery: from shipping tracking COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('DELIVERED','COMPLETED') THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CANCELLED','CANCEL_REQUESTED') THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED','REFUNDED') THEN 1 END), 0, -- rto -- SLA breaches COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CREATED','PAYMENT_PENDING') AND sla_breach_hours >= 4 AND sla_breach_hours < 8 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CREATED','PAYMENT_PENDING') AND sla_breach_hours >= 8 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status = 'PROCESSING' AND sla_breach_hours >= 4 THEN 1 END), COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('SHIPPED','PARTIALLY_SHIPPED') AND sla_breach_hours >= 24 THEN 1 END), -- Rates CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('CANCELLED') THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, 0, CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN (COUNT(CASE WHEN order_status IN ('RETURN_REQUESTED','REFUNDED') THEN 1 END) * 10000 / COUNT(*))::INT ELSE 0 END, -- Orders per minute (based on today's volume / minutes elapsed) CASE WHEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - CURRENT_DATE::TIMESTAMP) / 60 > 0 THEN (COUNT(*) * 100 / (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM NOW() - CURRENT_DATE::TIMESTAMP) / 60))::INT ELSE 0 END FROM hm_query.order_details_flat WHERE order_date::DATE = CURRENT_DATE
